## Feature Description

A clear description of the proposed feature.

## Research-Only Confirmation

- [ ] This feature does NOT introduce live trading capability
- [ ] This feature does NOT introduce broker execution capability
- [ ] This feature does NOT enable order placement
- [ ] This feature does NOT enable automatic deployment
- [ ] This feature does NOT modify production systems
- [ ] This feature does NOT introduce governance bypass
- [ ] This feature preserves advisory-only outputs

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Phase Scope

Which phase(s) does this affect?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
